text.title: vision-accessibility Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for vision-accessibility as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Using VLM-extracted chart numbers directly in alt text without noting that numerical accuracy may be imperfect.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: VLMs hallucinate specific numbers in charts — always validate extracted numerical data against a second pass or source data before publishing as authoritative alt text.
